title: Mofu's subnauticraft
description: This small project plans to add all of the subnautica's leviathan in minecraft, starting with the reaper leviathan
body:
As a celebration for the early access of subnautica 2, i wanted to make a small project that adds all of the first game's leviathan
with the first one being the reaper leviathan

as of now the mod contains the reaper mob, that can spawn in most deep oceans.
a craftable seamoth
and a statue as a trophy if you get to kill the guy
and thats it.

the reaper has its own unique AI and set of attacks, and a "jumpscare" if the player gets attacked when low enough.
they spawn in all of the deep ocean biomes

pls report any bugs in the comments, and if you wish for me to continue this small project.

WARNING
TRUE SIZE COMMAND CANNOT BE UNDONE, BUT CAN BE LOCKED/UNLOCKED IF U WANT

I also made a youtube video on the process of making the mod and why i made it.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gzaYuvKlcoQ
